quality.formatting_notes: The description correctly links to the source spell ('[_wish_](#wish)').

mechanics.core_function: Allows the casting of the 'Wish' spell.
mechanics.limitations: 3 total charges. The ring becomes nonmagical after the last charge is used.
mechanics.potential_issues: While not a technical error, the item is extremely powerful due to directly granting the Wish spell without standard limitations or attunement. This reflects the item's intended legendary status.

analysis.recommendations: No changes necessary; the data accurately reflects a potent, high-rarity magical item.
